trans-unit.source: Replacement Mode
trans-unit.target: Replacement Mode

trans-unit.source: Isolation Mode
trans-unit.target: Isolation Mode

trans-unit.source: Terminal Mode
trans-unit.target: Terminal Mode

trans-unit.source: Allows the command to stop and wait for user input or action.
trans-unit.target: Allows the command to stop and wait for user input or action.

trans-unit.source: Run a command using the dotnetup-managed dotnet installation.
trans-unit.target: Run a command using the dotnetup-managed dotnet installation.

trans-unit.source: Error: dotnet executable not found at '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Error: dotnet executable not found at '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Error: Failed to start the dotnet process.
trans-unit.target: Error: Failed to start the dotnet process.

trans-unit.source: Arguments to forward to dotnet.
trans-unit.target: Arguments to forward to dotnet.

trans-unit.source: Run 'dotnetup install' to install a .NET SDK first.
trans-unit.target: Run 'dotnetup install' to install a .NET SDK first.

trans-unit.source: dotnetup is configured to be on PATH but is missing from the user PATH.
trans-unit.target: dotnetup is configured to be on PATH but is missing from the user PATH.

trans-unit.source: dotnetup is on the user PATH but is configured to be off.
trans-unit.target: dotnetup is on the user PATH but is configured to be off.

trans-unit.source: Windows user PATH / DOTNET_ROOT / system PATH do not match 'everywhere' mode expectations.
trans-unit.target: Windows user PATH / DOTNET_ROOT / system PATH do not match 'everywhere' mode expectations.

trans-unit.source: Windows user PATH / DOTNET_ROOT still has 'everywhere'-mode wiring (expected dotnet access: '{0}').
trans-unit.target: Windows user PATH / DOTNET_ROOT still has 'everywhere'-mode wiring (expected dotnet access: '{0}').

trans-unit.source: Shell profile is missing the dotnetup managed block.
trans-unit.target: Shell profile is missing the dotnetup managed block.

trans-unit.source: Shell profile contains a dotnetup managed block but neither dotnet access nor dotnetup-on-PATH is configured.
trans-unit.target: Shell profile contains a dotnetup managed block but neither dotnet access nor dotnetup-on-PATH is configured.

trans-unit.source: Open a new terminal for the change to take effect.
trans-unit.target: Open a new terminal for the change to take effect.

trans-unit.source: dotnet and dotnetup are on your PATH.
trans-unit.target: dotnet and dotnetup are on your PATH.

trans-unit.source: dotnet is on your PATH. dotnetup is not.
trans-unit.target: dotnet is on your PATH. dotnetup is not.

trans-unit.source: dotnetup is on your PATH. dotnet is not — run it with 'dotnetup dotnet <command>'.
trans-unit.target: dotnetup is on your PATH. dotnet is not — run it with 'dotnetup dotnet <command>'.

trans-unit.source: Neither dotnet nor dotnetup is on your PATH.
trans-unit.target: Neither dotnet nor dotnetup is on your PATH.

trans-unit.source: Generates a shell script that configures the environment for .NET. With no selection flags it follows your configured env settings; pass --dotnet and/or --dotnetup to emit only those parts.
trans-unit.target: Generates a shell script that configures the environment for .NET. With no selection flags it follows your configured env settings; pass --dotnet and/or --dotnetup to emit only those parts.

trans-unit.source: The path to the .NET installation directory. If not specified, uses the default user install path.
trans-unit.target: The path to the .NET installation directory. If not specified, uses the default user install path.

trans-unit.source: Add the managed dotnet to PATH and set DOTNET_ROOT.
trans-unit.target: Add the managed dotnet to PATH and set DOTNET_ROOT.

trans-unit.source: --dotnetup-only cannot be combined with --dotnet or --dotnetup.
trans-unit.target: --dotnetup-only cannot be combined with --dotnet or --dotnetup.

trans-unit.source: Only add dotnetup to PATH. Do not set DOTNET_ROOT or add the .NET install path.
trans-unit.target: Only add dotnetup to PATH. Do not set DOTNET_ROOT or add the .NET install path.

trans-unit.source: Add the dotnetup directory to PATH.
trans-unit.target: Add the dotnetup directory to PATH.

trans-unit.source: Error: Unable to detect current shell. The SHELL environment variable is not set.
trans-unit.target: Error: Unable to detect current shell. The SHELL environment variable is not set.

trans-unit.source: SHELL environment variable is not set; cannot detect shell.
trans-unit.target: SHELL environment variable is not set; cannot detect shell.

trans-unit.source: Please specify the shell using --shell option.
trans-unit.target: Please specify the shell using --shell option.

trans-unit.source: Please specify the shell using --shell option. Supported shells: {0}
trans-unit.target: Please specify the shell using --shell option. Supported shells: {0}

trans-unit.source: Supported shells: {0}
trans-unit.target: Supported shells: {0}

trans-unit.source: Error: Unsupported shell '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Error: Unsupported shell '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Unsupported shell '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Unsupported shell '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: 'everywhere' mode is only supported on Windows. Use 'shell' on this platform.
trans-unit.target: 'everywhere' mode is only supported on Windows. Use 'shell' on this platform.

trans-unit.source: No env mode specified and none is stored. Specify a mode: none, shell, or full.
trans-unit.target: No env mode specified and none is stored. Specify a mode: none, shell, or full.

trans-unit.source: To apply it to this terminal now, run:
trans-unit.target: To apply it to this terminal now, run:

trans-unit.source: Detected drift between configured settings and the current environment:
trans-unit.target: Detected drift between configured settings and the current environment:

trans-unit.source: dotnetup environment:
trans-unit.target: dotnetup environment:

trans-unit.source: In sync.
trans-unit.target: In sync.

trans-unit.source: In sync, but not yet active in this terminal.
trans-unit.target: In sync, but not yet active in this terminal.

trans-unit.source: dotnet access
trans-unit.target: dotnet access

trans-unit.source: dotnetup on PATH
trans-unit.target: dotnetup on PATH

trans-unit.source: No dotnetup env configuration found. Run 'dotnetup env set <mode>' to configure.
trans-unit.target: No dotnetup env configuration found. Run 'dotnetup env set <mode>' to configure.

trans-unit.source: Open a new terminal to pick up the change.
trans-unit.target: Open a new terminal to pick up the change.

trans-unit.source: Or open a new terminal.
trans-unit.target: Or open a new terminal.

trans-unit.source: Run 'dotnetup env set' to re-sync.
trans-unit.target: Run 'dotnetup env set' to re-sync.

trans-unit.source: Output format (text or json).
trans-unit.target: Output format (text or json).

trans-unit.source: Configuration Commands:
trans-unit.target: Configuration Commands:

trans-unit.source: Description:
trans-unit.target: Description:

trans-unit.source: Install Commands:
trans-unit.target: Install Commands:

trans-unit.source: Options:
trans-unit.target: Options:

trans-unit.source: Query Commands:
trans-unit.target: Query Commands:

trans-unit.source: Usage:
trans-unit.target: Usage:

trans-unit.source: Utility Commands:
trans-unit.target: Utility Commands:

trans-unit.source: Display dotnetup information.
trans-unit.target: Display dotnetup information.

trans-unit.source: dotnetup Information:
trans-unit.target: dotnetup Information:

trans-unit.source: Skip listing installed SDKs (faster).
trans-unit.target: Skip listing installed SDKs (faster).

trans-unit.source: Display dotnetup information.
trans-unit.target: Display dotnetup information.

trans-unit.source: Configure or reconfigure dotnetup settings and install .NET through the interactive setup flow.
trans-unit.target: Configure or reconfigure dotnetup settings and install .NET through the interactive setup flow.

trans-unit.source: List installed .NET SDKs and runtimes managed by dotnetup.
trans-unit.target: List installed .NET SDKs and runtimes managed by dotnetup.

trans-unit.source: (managed by dotnetup)
trans-unit.target: (managed by dotnetup)

trans-unit.source: Installations
trans-unit.target: Installations

trans-unit.source: (none)
trans-unit.target: (none)

trans-unit.source: Skip verifying that each installation is valid.
trans-unit.target: Skip verifying that each installation is valid.

trans-unit.source: Total
trans-unit.target: Total

trans-unit.source: The system will be configured to use dotnetup installs over any other installs.
trans-unit.target: The system will be configured to use dotnetup installs over any other installs.

trans-unit.source: Use 'dotnetup dotnet' to consume installs managed by dotnetup. New installs can be used alongside your existing installs.
trans-unit.target: Use 'dotnetup dotnet' to consume installs managed by dotnetup. New installs can be used alongside your existing installs.

trans-unit.source: Configure the current shell profile to use installs managed by dotnetup. Only applications launched from the shell will leverage dotnetup installs.
trans-unit.target: Configure the current shell profile to use installs managed by dotnetup. Only applications launched from the shell will leverage dotnetup installs.

trans-unit.source: Configure the current shell profile to use installs managed by dotnetup.
trans-unit.target: Configure the current shell profile to use installs managed by dotnetup.

trans-unit.source: PATH and DOTNET_ROOT have been updated. You can use 'dotnet' directly in new terminal sessions.
trans-unit.target: PATH and DOTNET_ROOT have been updated. You can use 'dotnet' directly in new terminal sessions.

trans-unit.source: You can run .NET commands with 'dotnetup dotnet <command>' (or 'dotnetup do <command>' for short).
trans-unit.target: You can run .NET commands with 'dotnetup dotnet <command>' (or 'dotnetup do <command>' for short).

trans-unit.source: Your shell profile has been updated. Restart your terminal or source your profile to use 'dotnet' directly.
trans-unit.target: Your shell profile has been updated. Restart your terminal or source your profile to use 'dotnet' directly.

trans-unit.source: (Suggested)
trans-unit.target: (Suggested)
trans-unit.note: Hint appended after the recommended mode name in the init summary, e.g. "Terminal Mode (Suggested)".

trans-unit.source: Replacement Mode is not supported on this operating system. Please choose Isolation Mode or Terminal Mode instead.
trans-unit.target: Replacement Mode is not supported on this operating system. Please choose Isolation Mode or Terminal Mode instead.

trans-unit.source: Recommended for users who want all of their debuggers, applications, and IDEs to use dotnetup installs by default. Admin privileges are required. Enables 'cmd' functionality by default. Other user accounts on this machine will be impacted and applications may break.
trans-unit.target: Recommended for users who want all of their debuggers, applications, and IDEs to use dotnetup installs by default. Admin privileges are required. Enables 'cmd' functionality by default. Other user accounts on this machine will be impacted and applications may break.

trans-unit.source: Recommended for users without admin rights, or for users who want to keep their system managed installs (e.g. {0}) as the default.
trans-unit.target: Recommended for users without admin rights, or for users who want to keep their system managed installs (e.g. {0}) as the default.

trans-unit.source: Modify the current shell profile file to consume dotnetup on PATH environment variables. Recommended for users who want to develop using dotnetup and launch their IDE through the terminal.
trans-unit.target: Modify the current shell profile file to consume dotnetup on PATH environment variables. Recommended for users who want to develop using dotnetup and launch their IDE through the terminal.

trans-unit.source: Only PowerShell will work in this mode. CMD has no profile file.
trans-unit.target: Only PowerShell will work in this mode. CMD has no profile file.

trans-unit.source: .NET toolchain manager for user level installs.
trans-unit.target: .NET toolchain manager for user level installs.

trans-unit.source: determined from global.json at {0}
trans-unit.target: determined from global.json at {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} is a file path. Shown in parentheses after the channel name.

trans-unit.source: SDK Channel:
trans-unit.target: SDK Channel:

trans-unit.source: Choose the channel, mode, and migrations yourself.
trans-unit.target: Choose the channel, mode, and migrations yourself.

trans-unit.source: No, customize setup
trans-unit.target: No, customize setup

trans-unit.source: Make no changes and quit.
trans-unit.target: Make no changes and quit.

trans-unit.source: Exit without changes
trans-unit.target: Exit without changes

trans-unit.source: System installs to migrate:
trans-unit.target: System installs to migrate:

trans-unit.source: ... and {0} more
trans-unit.target: ... and {0} more
trans-unit.note: {0} is the count of additional migration candidates not individually listed.

trans-unit.source: current: {0}
trans-unit.target: current: {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the user's currently configured mode name. Shown in parentheses after the recommended mode.

trans-unit.source: Mode:
trans-unit.target: Mode:

trans-unit.source: Replace your current settings with the recommended ones above.
trans-unit.target: Replace your current settings with the recommended ones above.

trans-unit.source: Install with the recommended settings shown above.
trans-unit.target: Install with the recommended settings shown above.

trans-unit.source: Yes, override settings with defaults
trans-unit.target: Yes, override settings with defaults

trans-unit.source: Yes, proceed with defaults and install
trans-unit.target: Yes, proceed with defaults and install

trans-unit.source: Would you like to install .NET with the recommended settings?
trans-unit.target: Would you like to install .NET with the recommended settings?

trans-unit.source: Welcome to {0}!
trans-unit.target: Welcome to {0}!

trans-unit.source: dotnetup collects usage data to help improve your experience. You can opt out by setting the DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1'. Learn more: https://aka.ms/dotnetup-telemetry
trans-unit.target: dotnetup collects usage data to help improve your experience. You can opt out by setting the DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1'. Learn more: https://aka.ms/dotnetup-telemetry
